name: mac-llm
description: Native macOS MLX LLM chat app with Open WebUI

variables.name: MLX_PORT
variables.description: Private localhost OpenAI-compatible MLX API port

variables.name: MODEL_ID
variables.description: Hugging Face MLX model ID to load on the Mac agent

variables.name: OPEN_WEBUI_VERSION
variables.description: Pinned Open WebUI package version installed with uv on the target Mac

variables.name: MAX_TOKENS
variables.description: Default maximum generated tokens per chat completion
